в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Middleware Stack

```typescript
// API Middleware Order:
1. Logger (honoLogger)
2. Pretty JSON (prettyJSON)
3. Secure Headers (secureHeaders)
4. CORS (cors)
5. Rate Limiter (rateLimiter)
6. Auth Middleware (per route)
7. Error Handler (errorHandler)
```

### Security Features

- **Rate Limiting** - Configurable per endpoint
- **CORS** - Whitelist specific origins
- **Secure Headers** - CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.
- **JWT Secrets** - Separate access/refresh tokens
- **Encryption** - Sensitive data encryption
- **Audit Logging** - All actions logged
- **IP Whitelist** - Optional IP restrictions
- **SSO Config** - Enterprise SSO support

- **Indexes** - On frequently queried fields
- **Partitioning** - By tenantId for large tables
- **pgvector** - For semantic search
- **Connection pooling** - Via Prisma
- **Query optimization** - N+1 prevention

## рҹ“Ҡ Key Metrics & Monitoring

### Performance Metrics

- **API Response Time** - Target: <200ms (p95)
- **Message Throughput** - 30 messages/second per session
- **Workflow Execution** - <5 seconds average
- **AI Response Time** - <3 seconds (streaming)
- **Database Query Time** - <100ms (p95)

- workflow:executed    // Workflow completed
- analytics:update     // Analytics data updated

4. **API Modules**

### Frontend TODOs

## рҹ”Қ Code Quality Observations

### Strengths
вң… Well-organized monorepo structure  
вң… Clear separation of concerns  
вң… Type-safe with TypeScript  
вң… Modern tech stack (Bun, Hono, Next.js 14)  
вң… Comprehensive database schema  
вң… Multi-tenant architecture from ground up  
вң… Good middleware organization  
вң… Proper error handling patterns  

### Areas for Improvement
вҡ пёҸ Many modules are skeleton implementations

вҡ пёҸ Limited error handling  
вҡ пёҸ No logging in most services  
вҡ пёҸ Missing documentation in code  
вҡ пёҸ No rate limiting per endpoint

## рҹҡҖ Getting Started

### Prerequisites
- Node.js 20+
- Bun 1.1+
- pnpm 9+
- Docker & Docker Compose
- PostgreSQL 16 (or Docker)
- Redis 7 (or Docker)

### Quick Start

```bash
# Clone & install
git clone <repo>
cd audira-ai
pnpm install

# Start databases
docker compose up -d postgres redis

# Setup environment
cp .env.example .env

# Generate Prisma client
pnpm db:generate

# Run migrations
pnpm db:push

# Start all services
pnpm dev
```

### Service URLs
- Web: http://localhost:3377
- Admin: http://localhost:3379
- API: http://localhost:3378
- AI Engine: http://localhost:3381
- WhatsApp Gateway: http://localhost:3382

Shared types в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ validators/ # Zod validators в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ constants/ # Constants в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ utils/ # Utility functions в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ package.json в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ ui/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ src/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ index.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/ # Creating a New Feature ```bash # Create feature branch git checkout -b feature/new-feature # Make changes # ... edit files ... # Run linting pnpm lint pnpm lint:fix # Run type checking pnpm type-check # Run tests pnpm test # Commit changes git add . git commit -m "feat: add new feature" # Push to remote git push origin feature/new-feature # Create pull request gh pr create --title "Add new feature" --body "Description" ``` ### 2. Adding a New API Module ```bash # 1. Create module directory mkdir -p apps/api/src/modules/my-feature # 2. Create files touch apps/api/src/modules/my-feature/{routes.ts,service.ts,service.test.ts} # 3. Implement routes.ts cat > apps/api/src/modules/my-feature/routes.ts << 'EOF' import { Hono } from "hono"; import { zValidator } from "@hono/zod-validator"; import { z } from "zod"; const router = new Hono(); // GET /my-feature router.get("/", async (c) => { // TODO: Implement return c.json({ success: true, data: [] }); }); // POST /my-feature router.post("/", zValidator("json", z.object({ name: z.string(), })), async (c) => { // TODO: Implement return c.json({ success: true, data: {} }, 201); }); export const myFeatureRoutes = router; EOF # 4. Add to main API routes (apps/api/src/index.ts) # import { myFeatureRoutes } from "./modules/my-feature/routes"; # app.route("/my-feature", myFeatureRoutes); # 5. Run type check pnpm type-check ``` ### 3. Adding a New Frontend Component ```bash # 1. Create component file touch apps/web/src/components/my-feature/MyComponent.tsx # 2. Create component cat > apps/web/src/components/my-feature/MyComponent.tsx << 'EOF' "use client"; import { FC } from "react"; interface MyComponentProps { title: string; } export const MyComponent: FC = ({ title }) => { return (

{title}

); }; EOF # 3. Export from index echo 'export { MyComponent } from "./MyComponent";' >> apps/web/src/components/my-feature/index.ts # 4. Use in page # import { MyComponent } from "@/components/my-feature"; ``` ### 4. Database Schema Changes ```bash # 1. Edit schema.prisma nano packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma # 2. Create migration pnpm db:migrate # 3. Generate Prisma client pnpm db:generate # 4. Test locally pnpm db:push ``` --- ## рҹ“ҡ API Documentation ### Authentication #### Login ```http POST /api/v1/auth/login Content-Type: application/json { "email": "user@example.com", "password": "password123" } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "accessToken": "eyJhbGc...", "refreshToken": "eyJhbGc...", "user": { "id": "user_123", "email": "user@example.com", "name": "John Doe" } } } ``` #### Register ```http POST /api/v1/auth/register Content-Type: application/json { "email": "user@example.com", "password": "password123", "name": "John Doe" } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "user": { "id": "user_123", "email": "user@example.com", "name": "John Doe" } } } ``` ### Contacts #### List Contacts ```http GET /api/v1/contacts?page=1&limit=20&search=john Authorization: Bearer Response: { "success": true, "data": { "contacts": [ { "id": "contact_123", "phone": "+1234567890", "name": "John Doe", "email": "john@example.com", "tags": ["vip", "customer"], "status": "ACTIVE", "lastContactedAt": "2026-05-16T08:00:00Z" } ], "pagination": { "page": 1, "limit": 20, "total": 100 } } } ``` #### Create Contact ```http POST /api/v1/contacts Authorization: Bearer Content-Type: application/json { "phone": "+1234567890", "name": "John Doe", "email": "john@example.com", "tags": ["vip"] } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "id": "contact_123", "phone": "+1234567890", "name": "John Doe", "email": "john@example.com", "tags": ["vip"], "status": "ACTIVE", "createdAt": "2026-05-16T08:00:00Z" } } ``` ### Conversations #### List Conversations ```http GET /api/v1/conversations?status=OPEN&limit=20 Authorization: Bearer Response: { "success": true, "data": { "conversations": [ { "id": "conv_123", "contactId": "contact_123", "status": "OPEN", "channel": "WHATSAPP", "lastMessageAt": "2026-05-16T08:00:00Z", "assignedAgent": { "id": "user_456", "name": "Agent Name" } } ] } } ``` #### Send Message ```http POST /api/v1/messages Authorization: Bearer Content-Type: application/json { "conversationId": "conv_123", "content": "Hello, how can I help?", "type": "TEXT" } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "id": "msg_123", "conversationId": "conv_123", "content": "Hello, how can I help?", "type": "TEXT", "status": "QUEUED", "createdAt": "2026-05-16T08:00:00Z" } } ``` ### AI Agents #### Execute Agent ```http POST /ai/agents/execute Content-Type: application/json { "agentId": "agent_123", "tenantId": "tenant_456", "input": "What are our top products?", "tools": [ { "name": "search_products", "description": "Search for products", "parameters": { "type": "object", "properties": { "query": { "type": "string" } } } } ] } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "output": "Our top products are...", "toolCalls": [ { "name": "search_products", "args": { "query": "top products" }, "result": { "products": [...] } } ], "usage": { "promptTokens": 150, "completionTokens": 200 } } } ``` ### Workflows #### Create Workflow ```http POST /api/v1/workflows Authorization: Bearer Content-Type: application/json { "name": "Welcome Flow", "description": "Send welcome message to new contacts", "trigger": { "type": "contact_created" }, "nodes": [ { "id": "node_1", "type": "send_message", "data": { "message": "Welcome to our service!" } } ], "edges": [] } Response: { "success": true, "data": { "id": "workflow_123", "name": "Welcome Flow", "status": "DRAFT", "createdAt": "2026-05-16T08:00:00Z" } } ``` --- ## рҹ—„пёҸ Database Management ### Common Prisma Commands ```bash # Generate Prisma client pnpm db:generate # Create migration pnpm db:migrate # Push schema to database (dev only) pnpm db:push # Open Prisma Studio (GUI) pnpm db:studio # Seed database pnpm db:seed # Reset database (dev only) pnpm db:reset ``` ### Writing Migrations ```bash # Create a new migration pnpm db:migrate --name add_new_field # This creates a migration file in packages/database/prisma/migrations/ # Edit the migration file to add your SQL changes # Then run: pnpm db:migrate ``` ### Database Queries (Prisma) ```typescript // apps/api/src/modules/contacts/service.ts import { prisma } from "@audira/database"; export class ContactService { async getContacts(tenantId: string, page = 1, limit = 20) { const skip = (page - 1) * limit; const [contacts, total] = await Promise.all([ prisma.contact.findMany({ where: { tenantId }, skip, take: limit, orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }, }), prisma.contact.count({ where: { tenantId } }), ]); return { contacts, total, page, limit }; } async createContact(tenantId: string, data: CreateContactInput) { return prisma.contact.create({ data: { tenantId, ...data, }, }); } async updateContact(id: string, data: UpdateContactInput) { return prisma.contact.update({ where: { id }, data, }); } async deleteContact(id: string) { return prisma.contact.delete({ where: { id }, }); } } ``` --- ## рҹ§Ә Testing Strategy ### Unit Tests ```typescript // apps/api/src/modules/auth/service.test.ts import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from "@jest/globals"; import { AuthService } from "./service"; describe("AuthService", () => { let authService: AuthService; beforeEach(() => { authService = new AuthService(); }); it("should hash password correctly", async () => { const password = "test123"; const hash = await authService.hashPassword(password); expect(hash).not.toBe(password); expect(await authService.verifyPassword(password, hash)).toBe(true); }); it("should generate valid JWT token", () => { const token = authService.generateToken({ userId: "user_123" }); expect(token).toBeDefined(); expect(typeof token).toBe("string"); const decoded = authService.verifyToken(token); expect(decoded.userId).toBe("user_123"); }); }); ``` ### Integration Tests ```typescript // apps/api/src/modules/contacts/routes.test.ts import { describe, it, expect } from "@jest/globals"; import { Hono } from "hono"; import { contactsRoutes } from "./routes"; describe("Contacts Routes", () => { const app = new Hono().route("/contacts", contactsRoutes); it("should list contacts", async () => { const res = await app.request("/contacts", { method: "GET", headers: { Authorization: "Bearer token" }, }); expect(res.status).toBe(200); const data = await res.json(); expect(data.success).toBe(true); expect(Array.isArray(data.data.contacts)).toBe(true); }); }); ``` ### Running Tests ```bash # Run all tests pnpm test # Run tests in watch mode pnpm test:watch # Run tests with coverage pnpm test:coverage # Run specific test file pnpm test -- auth.test.ts ``` --- ## рҹҡҖ Deployment Guide ### Docker Build ```bash # Build specific service docker build -f infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api -t audira-api:latest . # Build all services docker compose build # Push to registry docker tag audira-api:latest ghcr.io/your-org/audira-api:latest docker push ghcr.io/your-org/audira-api:latest ``` ### Kubernetes Deployment ```bash # Create namespace kubectl create namespace audira # Create secrets kubectl create secret generic app-secrets \ --from-literal=JWT_SECRET=your-secret \ --from-literal=OPENAI_API_KEY=your-key \ -n audira # Deploy services kubectl apply -f infrastructure/kubernetes/ -n audira # Check deployment status kubectl get deployments -n audira kubectl get pods -n audira # View logs kubectl logs -f deployment/api-deployment -n audira # Scale deployment kubectl scale deployment api-deployment --replicas=3 -n audira ``` ### Environment-Specific Deployment ```bash # Development docker compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d # Staging docker compose -f docker-compose.staging.yml up -d # Production kubectl apply -f infrastructure/kubernetes/production/ -n audira ``` --- ## рҹ”§ Troubleshooting ### Common Issues #### 1. Database Connection Error ``` Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432 ``` **Solution:** ```bash # Check if PostgreSQL is running docker compose ps postgres # Start PostgreSQL docker compose up -d postgres # Check connection string in .env echo $DATABASE_URL ``` #### 2. Redis Connection Error ``` Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:6379 ``` **Solution:** ```bash # Start Redis docker compose up -d redis # Test connection redis-cli ping ``` #### 3. Port Already in Use ``` Error: listen EADDRINUSE :::3378 ``` **Solution:** ```bash # Find process using port lsof -i :3378 # Kill process kill -9 # Or use different port PORT=3380 pnpm dev --filter @audira/api ``` #### 4. Prisma Client Not Generated ``` Error: Cannot find module '@prisma/client' ``` **Solution:** ```bash # Generate Prisma client pnpm db:generate # Or reinstall pnpm install pnpm db:generate ``` #### 5. TypeScript Compilation Error ``` Error: Type 'X' is not assignable to type 'Y' ``` **Solution:** ```bash # Run type check pnpm type-check # Fix errors in code # Then rebuild pnpm build ``` ### Debug Mode ```bash # Enable debug logging DEBUG=audira:* pnpm dev # Enable Prisma debug DEBUG=prisma:* pnpm dev # Enable all debug DEBUG=* pnpm dev ``` ### Performance Debugging ```bash # Check database query performance pnpm db:studio # Monitor Redis redis-cli monitor # Check Node.js memory usage node --inspect apps/api/src/index.ts # Then open chrome://inspect in Chrome ``` --- ## рҹ“һ Getting Help - **Documentation**: Check ANALYSIS.md for architecture overview - **Issues**: Create GitHub issue with reproduction steps - **Discussions**: Use GitHub Discussions for questions - **Slack**: Join team Slack channel #audira-dev --- **Last Updated:** 16 Mei 2026, 08:54 UTC

# рҹ“Ҡ Audira AI - Executive Summary

**Ringkasan Analisis Komprehensif untuk Stakeholders**

---

## рҹҺҜ Project Overview

**Audira AI** adalah platform SaaS berbasis cloud yang mengotomatisasi komunikasi WhatsApp dengan kecerdasan buatan. Platform ini dirancang sebagai sistem multi-tenant yang scalable dengan arsitektur microservices modern.

### Key Metrics

| Metrik | Status | Target |
|--------|--------|--------|
| **Versi** | 0.1.0 | 1.0.0 |
| **Completion** | ~30% | 100% |
| **Code Coverage** | ~5% | 80%+ |
| **Services** | 7 | 7 |
| **API Modules** | 32 | 32 |
| **Database Tables** | 50+ | 50+ |
| **Team Size** | 1-2 | 12-15 |

---

## рҹ’Ў What's Working Well

### вң… Architecture Foundation
- **Monorepo Structure**: Turborepo setup dengan workspace yang terorganisir
- **Multi-tenant Design**: Tenant isolation di level database
- **Microservices**: 7 services terpisah dengan tanggung jawab jelas
- **Modern Stack**: Bun, Hono, Next.js 14, TypeScript, Prisma
- **Database Schema**: Comprehensive Prisma schema dengan 50+ models

### вң… Infrastructure
- **Docker Support**: Docker Compose untuk development
- **CI/CD Pipeline**: GitHub Actions workflow untuk lint, build, docker
- **Database**: PostgreSQL dengan pgvector untuk AI embeddings
- **Caching**: Redis untuk session, cache, job queue
- **Job Queue**: BullMQ untuk background jobs

### вң… AI Integration
- **OpenAI Integration**: GPT-4o untuk chat completion
- **LangChain**: Framework untuk AI orchestration
- **RAG Pipeline**: Knowledge base dengan vector embeddings
- **Agent Framework**: Tool calling support untuk AI agents

### вң… Communication
- **WhatsApp Support**: Cloud API + Baileys provider
- **WebSocket**: Socket.IO untuk real-time updates
- **Multi-channel**: Telegram, Discord, Email integration

---

## вҡ пёҸ Critical Issues

#### 1. Incomplete Implementation (30% done)
**Impact**: Cannot deploy to production  
**Effort**: 4-6 weeks

- [ ] Error handling (global error handler)
- [ ] Logging system (Winston/Pino)
- [ ] Test coverage (80% target)
- [ ] Frontend UI (most pages not implemented)
- [ ] AI engine (orchestrator incomplete)
- [ ] Workflow engine (executor incomplete)
- [ ] WhatsApp gateway (providers incomplete)

```

- [ ] Integration tests for API
- [ ] E2E tests for workflows
- [ ] Performance tests
- [ ] Security tests
```

#### 3. Inadequate Error Handling
**Impact**: Poor user experience, hard to debug  
**Effort**: 1-2 weeks

```
Issues:
- [ ] No global error handler
- [ ] No input validation
- [ ] No error logging
- [ ] No error recovery
- [ ] No user-friendly error messages
```

#### 4. Missing Logging
**Impact**: Cannot debug production issues  
**Effort**: 1 week

```
Missing:
- [ ] Structured logging (JSON)
- [ ] Log levels (debug, info, warn, error)
- [ ] Log aggregation
- [ ] Performance monitoring
- [ ] Error tracking
```

# вң… Audira AI - Development Checklist

**Panduan Praktis untuk Implementasi & Quality Assurance**

---

## рҹҡҖ Pre-Development Setup

### Environment Setup
- [ ] Node.js 20+ installed
- [ ] Bun 1.1+ installed
- [ ] pnpm 9+ installed
- [ ] Docker & Docker Compose installed
- [ ] Git configured with SSH keys
- [ ] IDE configured (VS Code recommended)

### Repository Setup
- [ ] Repository cloned
- [ ] `.env` file created from `.env.example`
- [ ] All environment variables configured
- [ ] `pnpm install` completed successfully
- [ ] `pnpm db:generate` completed
- [ ] `pnpm db:push` completed
- [ ] All services start without errors: `pnpm dev`

### Database Setup
- [ ] PostgreSQL running (docker compose up -d postgres)
- [ ] Redis running (docker compose up -d redis)
- [ ] Database migrations applied
- [ ] Prisma Studio accessible (pnpm db:studio)
- [ ] Sample data seeded (optional)

### IDE Configuration
- [ ] ESLint extension installed
- [ ] Prettier extension installed
- [ ] TypeScript extension installed
- [ ] Thunder Client or Postman installed
- [ ] Git Graph extension installed

---

## рҹ“қ Phase 1: Foundation (Weeks 1-4)

### Week 1: Service Layer Implementation

#### Auth Module
- [ ] Create `apps/api/src/modules/auth/service.ts`
- [ ] Implement `AuthService` class
  - [ ] `hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string>`
  - [ ] `verifyPassword(password: string, hash: string): Promise<boolean>`
  - [ ] `generateToken(payload: any): string`
  - [ ] `verifyToken(token: string): any`
  - [ ] `generateRefreshToken(payload: any): string`
  - [ ] `login(email: string, password: string): Promise<LoginResponse>`
  - [ ] `register(input: RegisterInput): Promise<User>`
  - [ ] `refreshToken(token: string): Promise<TokenResponse>`
- [ ] Add unit tests for AuthService
- [ ] Update routes to use service

#### Contacts Module
- [ ] Create `apps/api/src/modules/contacts/service.ts`
- [ ] Implement `ContactService` class
  - [ ] `getContacts(tenantId: string, filters: FilterInput): Promise<Contact[]>`

# рҹҡҖ Audira AI - Quick Reference Guide

**Panduan Cepat untuk Developers & DevOps**

---

## рҹ“ҡ Documentation Index

| Document | Purpose | Audience |
|----------|---------|----------|
| **ANALYSIS.md** | Complete system architecture & overview | Technical leads, architects |
| **IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md** | Setup, development workflow, API docs | Developers |
| **DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md** | Phases, priorities, recommendations | Project managers, leads |
| **ARCHITECTURE_DEEP_DIVE.md** | Design patterns, best practices | Senior developers |
| **EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.md** | High-level overview & metrics | Stakeholders, management |
| **DEVELOPMENT_CHECKLIST.md** | Task-by-task implementation guide | Developers, QA |
| **QUICK_REFERENCE.md** | This file - quick lookup | Everyone |

---

## вҡЎ Quick Start (5 minutes)

```bash
# 1. Clone & install
git clone <repo>
cd audira-ai
pnpm install

# 2. Setup environment
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env with your values

# 3. Start databases
docker compose up -d postgres redis

# 4. Setup database
pnpm db:generate
pnpm db:push

# 5. Start all services
pnpm dev

# 6. Access services
# Web: http://localhost:3377
# Admin: http://localhost:3379
# API: http://localhost:3378
# AI Engine: http://localhost:3381
```

---

## рҹ”§ Common Commands

### Development
```bash
pnpm dev                    # Start all services
pnpm dev --filter @audira/api    # Start specific service
pnpm lint                   # Run ESLint
pnpm lint:fix              # Fix linting issues
pnpm type-check            # TypeScript check
pnpm test                  # Run tests
pnpm test:watch            # Watch mode
pnpm test:coverage         # Coverage report
```

### Database
```bash
pnpm db:generate           # Generate Prisma client
pnpm db:push               # Push schema to DB
pnpm db:migrate            # Create migration
pnpm db:seed               # Seed database
pnpm db:studio             # Open Prisma Studio
pnpm db:reset              # Reset database (dev only)
```

### Build & Deploy
```bash
pnpm build                 # Build all services
pnpm clean                 # Clean build artifacts
docker compose build       # Build Docker images
docker compose up -d       # Start with Docker
docker compose down        # Stop services
```

---

## рҹ“Ғ Project Structure Quick Map

```
audira-ai/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ apps/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ api/               вҶ’ REST API (port 3378)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ web/               вҶ’ Main UI (port 3377)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ admin/             вҶ’ Admin panel (port 3379)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ai-engine/         вҶ’ AI service (port 3381)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ whatsapp-gateway/  вҶ’ WhatsApp (port 3382)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ workflow-engine/   вҶ’ Workflows (port 3384)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ desktop/           вҶ’ Electron app
в”ңв”Җв”Җ packages/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ database/          вҶ’ Prisma schema
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ shared/            вҶ’ Types & validators
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ui/                вҶ’ React components
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ config/            вҶ’ ESLint, TypeScript
в””в”Җв”Җ infrastructure/        вҶ’ Docker, K8s, Nginx
```

---

## рҹ”Ң API Endpoints Quick Reference

### Authentication
```
POST   /api/v1/auth/login
POST   /api/v1/auth/register
POST   /api/v1/auth/refresh
POST   /api/v1/auth/logout
```

### Contacts
```
GET    /api/v1/contacts
POST   /api/v1/contacts
GET    /api/v1/contacts/:id
PUT    /api/v1/contacts/:id
DELETE /api/v1/contacts/:id
```

### Conversations
```
GET    /api/v1/conversations
POST   /api/v1/conversations
GET    /api/v1/conversations/:id
PUT    /api/v1/conversations/:id
```

### Messages
```
GET    /api/v1/messages
POST   /api/v1/messages
GET    /api/v1/messages/:id
DELETE /api/v1/messages/:id
```

### AI Agents
```

## рҹ—„пёҸ Database Quick Reference

### Key Tables
```
users                    вҶ’ User accounts
tenants                  вҶ’ Organizations
tenant_members           вҶ’ User-tenant relationships
contacts                 вҶ’ Customer contacts
conversations            вҶ’ Chat conversations
messages                 вҶ’ Chat messages
whatsapp_sessions        вҶ’ WhatsApp connections
workflows                вҶ’ Automation workflows
ai_agents                вҶ’ AI agent configs
knowledge_bases          вҶ’ RAG knowledge bases
campaigns                вҶ’ Broadcast campaigns
deals                    вҶ’ CRM deals
```

### Common Queries
```typescript
// Get tenant contacts
prisma.contact.findMany({
  where: { tenantId }
})

// Get conversation with messages
prisma.conversation.findUnique({
  where: { id },
  include: { messages: true }
})

// Get active workflows
prisma.workflow.findMany({
  where: { tenantId, status: "ACTIVE" }
})

// Get user with tenant memberships
prisma.user.findUnique({
  where: { id },
  include: { memberships: true }
})
```

## рҹҗӣ Troubleshooting Quick Guide

### Port Already in Use
```bash
# Find process
lsof -i :3378

# Kill process
kill -9 <PID>

# Or use different port
PORT=3380 pnpm dev --filter @audira/api
```

### Database Connection Error
```bash
# Check if running
docker compose ps postgres

# Start if not running
docker compose up -d postgres

# Check connection string
echo $DATABASE_URL
```

### Prisma Client Not Found
```bash
# Regenerate
pnpm db:generate

# Or reinstall
pnpm install
pnpm db:generate
```

### TypeScript Errors
```bash
# Check types
pnpm type-check

# Fix issues
# Then rebuild
pnpm build
```

### Tests Failing
```bash
# Run specific test
pnpm test -- auth.test.ts

# Watch mode
pnpm test:watch

# Coverage
pnpm test:coverage
```

## рҹҡҖ Deployment Quick Guide

### Docker
```bash
# Build image
docker build -f infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.api -t audira-api:latest .

# Run container
docker run -p 3378:3378 audira-api:latest

# Push to registry
docker tag audira-api:latest ghcr.io/org/audira-api:latest
docker push ghcr.io/org/audira-api:latest
```

### Kubernetes
```bash
# Create namespace
kubectl create namespace audira

# Deploy
kubectl apply -f infrastructure/kubernetes/ -n audira

# Check status
kubectl get pods -n audira

# View logs
kubectl logs -f deployment/api-deployment -n audira

# Scale
kubectl scale deployment api-deployment --replicas=3 -n audira
```

### Environment-specific
```bash
# Development
docker compose up -d

# Staging
docker compose -f docker-compose.staging.yml up -d

# Production
kubectl apply -f infrastructure/kubernetes/production/ -n audira
```

**Audira AI** is a well-architected platform with strong foundations but requires significant implementation work. With a dedicated team of 12-15 people, the project can reach production in 5 months (20 weeks).
